skills.name: Ride (Horse)
skills.description: Control and ride a horse, even under duress.

skills.name: Perception
skills.description: Notice details, spot the hidden, and read a situation.

skills.name: Melee (Basic)
skills.description: Fight with common one-handed weapons and fists.

skills.name: Ranged (Bow)
skills.description: Shoot bows and longbows accurately.

skills.name: Outdoor Survival
skills.description: Endure and navigate the wilderness.

skills.name: Intimidate
skills.description: Cow others through threats and sheer presence.

skills.name: Track
skills.description: Follow trails left by people and creatures.

skills.name: Lore (Heraldry)
skills.description: Recognise noble houses, arms, and banners.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.description: Run, climb, jump, and swim.

skills.name: Animal Care
skills.description: Tend, calm, and treat animals.

skills.name: Endurance
skills.description: Resist fatigue, poison, and hardship.

skills.name: Haggle
skills.description: Negotiate better prices in trade.

skills.name: Channelling (Fire)
skills.description: Draw the Wind of Aqshy to power spells.

skills.name: Language (Magick)
skills.description: Read and speak the language of spellcraft.

skills.name: Lore (Magick)
skills.description: Understand the Winds of Magic and the Colleges.

skills.name: Lore (Bright Order)
skills.description: Know the history and secrets of the Bright College.

skills.name: Cool
skills.description: Keep your nerve under fear and pressure.

skills.name: Intuition
skills.description: Trust your gut to sense trouble.

skills.name: Charm
skills.description: Win others over with warmth and wit.

skills.name: Pray
skills.description: Invoke a deity for divine aid.

skills.name: Heal
skills.description: Treat wounds, disease, and poison.

skills.name: Lore (Theology)
skills.description: Know the gods, their cults, and dogma.

skills.name: Lore (Shallya)
skills.description: Know the rites and mercy of the Goddess of Healing.
